title: 2 Piece Silicone Rectangle Air Fryer Liners 20cm x 13cm - Reusable, Non-Stick Mat, Easy Clean, Air Fryer Accessories, Baking, Steaming, Cooking, Double Basket, Perforated, Dishwasher Safe
features: These liners are made from food-grade silicone that can be reused hundreds of times. Unlike single-use parchment sheets, they offer a sustainable and cost-effective solution for your kitchen. Reduce waste and enjoy guilt-free cooking with a reliable alternative that’s built to last.

Measuring 20cm x 13cm, they’re designed to fit snugly in most rectangular or double basket air fryers. The tailored fit helps prevent food from spilling over the sides while ensuring full coverage during cooking. Enjoy more consistent results with a liner that works in harmony with your appliance.

The liners feature a thoughtful perforated pattern that promotes optimal airflow around your food. This results in more even cooking, better browning, and improved texture across a variety of dishes. Say goodbye to soggy bottoms and hello to perfectly crispy results.

Engineered to withstand high cooking temperatures, these silicone mats are safe for air frying, baking, steaming, and reheating. Their versatile design allows you to use them in ovens and steamers as well. Whether you're meal prepping or experimenting with recipes, these liners have you covered.
Included in this package, you will receive 2 rectangle silicone air fryer liners. Each measuring 20cm (7.9") in length and 13cm (5") in width.
description: Simplify your cooking and cleaning routine with this Pack of 2 Silicone Rectangle Air Fryer Liners, specially designed to fit a wide range of air fryer models, including dual-basket systems. Measuring 20cm x 13cm, these durable, reusable liners feature a non-stick, heat-resistant surface that makes them great for air frying, baking, steaming, and more. With strategically placed perforations for even heat circulation, they help you cook food more efficiently while minimizing mess and cleanup time. Made from food-grade silicone, these liners are completely BPA-free, dishwasher safe, and eco-friendly, offering a sustainable alternative to disposable parchment paper. Whether you're making crispy fries, roasted veggies, or tender meats, these liners help maintain your air fryer’s interior while enhancing food quality and preserving flavor. They're an essential upgrade for anyone looking to get the most out of their air fryer with less hassle.
